title: NVIDIA data center hardware is being cooled with water 'hotter than a hot tub' - Engadget
summary: That's a complete overhaul of the cooling system on massive data centers. Normally, you need ear protection inside data centers to keep down the loud noises produced by cooling fans, backup generators and cooling systems.
